description: Binding a Dev Containers mount directly to /tmp/pi-lattice-ssh-agent.sock can leave an unremovable directory at that socket path under WSL/Docker Desktop.
resolution: Mount /tmp/pi-lattice-ssh-agent as a directory and configure SSH_AUTH_SOCK to /tmp/pi-lattice-ssh-agent/agent.sock so the socket file lives inside an existing host directory.

description: Installing pi globally as root under /usr/local in the devcontainer makes Updated packages fail for the remote  user with npm EACCES rename errors.
resolution: Set NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX to a node-owned prefix such as /home/node/.npm-global, put that bin directory on PATH, and run  as the node user in the Dockerfile.
